title: WhatsApp adds Apple CarPlay and Android Auto upgrades, iPad sign-ups, and more | TechCrunch
summary: WhatsApp says that since launching WhatsApp for iPad last year, people have requested the option to create an account directly on their iPad without having to link to their phone.
